creator: tcberner@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 234985
v1

Moin moin 

kde@ would like to ask for an exp-run to upgrade / relabel our packages to 5.15.

The patch is attached, and can also be found here:
https://people.freebsd.org/~tcberner/patches/0001-qt5-Update-Qt-to-5.15.5-KDE-patched.patch


mfg Tobias
